notFound.title: Route not found
notFound.description: This shell only exposes Phase 2 public, auth, and role dashboard entry routes.

balance.title: Free reward wallet
balance.rulesToast: Earn points to receive a gift code. Present the code at the counter for physical rewards.

note.owner: Owners (70%) and jockeys (30%) receive points automatically after official results. Redeem via confirmation code at the counter.
note.jockey: Owners (70%) and jockeys (30%) receive points automatically after official results. Redeem via confirmation code at the counter.
note.spectator: Users without points can place free predictions (correct +1, incorrect no penalty). Users with points must bet 2 Pts or more (win x2, lose entire bet).
note.referee: Referees receive salary points after completing officiating assignments and can redeem rewards at the counter.

transactions.title: Point transaction history
transactions.emptyHint: Try adjusting filters or search keywords.

cashoutForm.title: Redeem Points
cashoutForm.desc: Convert your accumulated reward points into a redemption code. Bring this code to the physical counter for staff confirmation and gift delivery.
cashoutForm.infoDesc: A unique redemption code will be generated. Points are only deducted from your wallet when counter staff successfully verify and process the gift delivery.
cashoutForm.warningOver: Note: Do not redeem more points than your available balance at the time of receiving gifts at the counter.
cashoutForm.warningAudit: Redemption transactions are securely audited and logged in the Ledger system.
cashoutForm.errInvalid: Please enter a valid amount of points.
cashoutForm.errExceed: Redemption points exceed your current balance.
cashoutForm.errMin: The minimum points to redeem is 10 points.
cashoutForm.successMsg: Successfully requested redemption of {{points}} points! Please save your redemption code.

redemption.lookupDesc: Enter the redemption code provided by the user to check details and deliver gifts.
redemption.emptyLookup: This redemption code was not found.
redemption.rejectConfirmText: Are you sure you want to reject redemption code {{code}} for {{name}} ({{points}} points)?
redemption.rejectReasonPlaceholder: E.g., Invalid code, incorrect account details...
redemption.historyDesc: Complete list of all point redemption transactions in the system.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage display and language preferences for HorseTrack.

pendingRegistrations.label: Pending registrations

raceStatus.radarDesc: One-screen status summary for independent races. No rounds, no stage progression.

act01.title: Registration queue updated

header.title: Reward Redemption Counter
header.description: Welcome to the Counter Staff desk. Here you can approve physical gift codes and assist customers with deposits.

redemption.title: Physical Reward Redemption
redemption.desc: Look up redemption codes like RWD-XXXXXX provided by users at the counter, verify gift information and update status to successfully delivered.

deposit.title: Customer Deposit
deposit.desc: Assist in depositing cash in exchange for reward points/wallet balance at the counter. Enter customer email/account ID to execute direct deposits quickly.

recentRedemptions.title: Recent Redemptions
recentRedemptions.empty: No redemption transactions have been made yet.

header.title: Stable Management
header.description: Command center for independent horse owners. Register horses, enter races, and manage 70/30 revenue share from race prizes.

hero.title: Upgrade your horses. Win on every track.
hero.description: Control the process from selection, race registration to optimizing the 70% profit share from the prize pool. Ensure your horses are always healthy and ready before start time.

horses.label: Horses in Stable
horses.helper: Total number of horses registered in your portfolio.

horses.title: Horse Stable
horses.desc: View details, update info and manage your own list of racing horses.

races.title: Enter Race

registrations.title: Entry History
registrations.desc: Track race entry approval progress and cancel or withdraw registrations.

wallet.title: My Wallet
wallet.desc: Request cashout, check reward point balance and view wallet statements.

header.title: Jockey Station
header.description: Welcome to the Jockey management area. Receive 70/30 profit sharing race invitations from owners, view horse details, manage race schedule and track your personal performance.

hero.title: Committed 30% of match prize pool
hero.description: Default contract between owner and Jockey: 70% belongs to owner, 30% belongs to winning Jockey. All accepted invitations are checked by the system for a 4-hour conflict window to ensure safety.
hero.newInvitesDesc: You have {count} pending invitations from owners.

races.label: Participated Races
races.helper: Total official races you have completed.

points.label: Total Match Points
points.helper: Rank conversion: 1st place gets 10pts, 2nd gets 7pts, 3rd gets 5pts...

ui.loadError: Could not connect to server. Please try again.
ui.inboxEmptyDesc: No ride invitations from owners. When owners need a jockey, invitations will appear here.
ui.noAssigned: No accepted races in your schedule.
ui.historyNote: Detailed position and points history comes from official results published by race officials.
ui.noScheduleDesc: When you accept owner invitations, your start schedule will appear here.
ui.noHorseAssignedDesc: When you accept invitations, assigned horse details will appear here.
ui.raceRoleDesc: Your horse in accepted rides. Stamina and speed greatly affect final results.

header.title: Tracks & Predictions
header.description: Browse top-tier horse racing tournaments, join free predictions to earn reward points, and redeem exciting physical gifts at the counter.

today.label: Today Schedule
today.desc: Live results update from the track

accuracy.label: Prediction Accuracy
accuracy.desc: Users without points: Free (correct +1, wrong no penalty). Users with points: Bet 2 Pts or more (win x2, lose entire bet).

tournaments.title: Featured Tournaments
tournaments.desc: Explore thrilling upcoming or ongoing horse racing tournaments

upcoming.title: Hot Upcoming Races
upcoming.desc: Follow and place early predictions before start time

rules.title: Reward Rule
rules.desc: Users without points can place free predictions (1 Pts): Correct gets +1 point, incorrect gets no penalty. Users with points must bet 2 Pts or more: Win gets double payout (x2), lose loses the entire bet amount.

header.title: Supervisory Board
header.description: Manage race officiating schedule, inspect horses pre-race, record violations, and confirm official race result reports.

profileCheck.title: Initialize your Referee Profile
profileCheck.desc: Hello **{name}**, you have the Referee role but have not created your professional profile yet. Please enter your license number below to receive race supervision assignments from the Organizing Committee.

dashboard.title: REFEREE WORKSPACE
dashboard.desc: Manage authorized races. Perform full inspections of protective gear, horse health, jockey attendance, and establish standardized rankings after the match is completed.

alerts.newAssignmentsDesc: You have {count} new races assigned by the Organizing Committee pending approval.

report.title: Close & Sync
report.desc: When the main referee clicks **Confirm Results**, the system will automatically apply time penalties from the violation board, recalculate the actual horse rankings, and lock modifications.

empty.title: No assignments yet
empty.desc: List is empty. When the Organizing Committee assigns you to a race supervision team, the race details and operational APIs will fully display here.

horses.title: Horse Management
horses.description: View all horses in the system. Admins can delete violating horses.

jockeys.title: Jockey Management
jockeys.description: View all jockey profiles including inactive/suspended. Change status here.

tournaments.title: Tournament Management
tournaments.description: Create, update status, and delete tournaments. Each tournament contains multiple independent races.

tournamentsNew.title: New tournament setup
tournamentsNew.description: Fill in the details below to create a new tournament. It starts in DRAFT status.

tournamentForm.title: Create new tournament
tournamentForm.subtitle: Set up a tournament container for upcoming horse races.
tournamentForm.locationPlaceholder: e.g. Phu Tho Racecourse, Ho Chi Minh City
tournamentForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief rules, prizes, or organizer notes...
tournamentForm.scopeBody: New tournaments start in <1>DRAFT</1>. Update to <2>OPEN REGISTRATION</2> on the detail page so owners can register horses.

validation.datesRequired: Please enter tournament start and end dates.
validation.startBeforeEnd: Start date must be before end date.
validation.regStartBeforeEnd: Registration start must be before registration end.
validation.regBeforeTournament: Registration must end before the tournament starts.
validation.minHorses: Maximum horses must be at least 2.

tournamentForm.createFailed: Failed to create tournament. Please try again.

mockRaces.detailDescription: Race is the core business object: schedule, participants, referee, status timeline, and metadata are grouped in one admin control view.

bets.title: Prediction Management
bets.description: View all user predictions/bets. Results update automatically after race publish.

cashouts.title: Counter Redemption Management
cashouts.description: Verify spectator, owner, and jockey redemption codes at the physical counter and reconcile system ledger points.

prizes.title: Prize Management
prizes.description: View all prizes auto-created (70% owner / 30% jockey) after race end. Admins can update payment status.

wallet.title: Points Transaction Management
wallet.description: View all wallet transactions and approve user cashout/redemption requests.

rankings.title: View / Update Rankings
rankings.description: Rankings are computed in real time from PUBLISHED race results. Select a tournament to view standings.
rankings.selectPrompt: Select a tournament to view rankings.

refereeAssignments.title: Referee Assignments
refereeAssignments.description: Select a race to view and manage assigned referees.
refereeAssignments.empty: No referees assigned to this race yet.

auditLogs.title: Operations Audit Trail
auditLogs.description: Verify system log consistency, track referee result entries, automatic prize splits, and wallet redemptions.

races.title: Race control board
races.description: Core race-centric admin UI: status visibility, schedule board, participant routes, reusable race components. Mock data only.
races.statusDesc: Phase 4C keeps every race independent. No rounds, stage progression, brackets, qualification, betting, or backend calls.

racesNew.title: New race setup
racesNew.description: Mock-first race creation UI for schedule, course, capacity, and referee planning. No backend submit.

raceDetail.description: Race info, schedule/location, participants, referee summary, status timeline, quick actions placeholder, and metadata.

raceAssignments.title: {{name}} assignments
raceAssignments.description: Continuity placeholder for referee and jockey assignments. No accept/reject workflow, no backend, no realtime.

raceParticipants.title: {{name}} grid
raceParticipants.description: Participant organization by horse, owner, jockey, lane/order, and status. Display-only mock data.

registrations.title: Race registration moderation
registrations.description: Review horse, owner, race target, submission time, and mock eligibility notes before approving or rejecting. FE-first; no backend calls.

registrationDetail.description: Single registration moderation panel with eligibility snapshot, note placeholder, approve/reject dialogs, and audit-style mock trail.

results.title: Race result review
results.description: Review per-race rankings, referee summary, draft/confirmed/published states, then publish confirmed results. Mock data only.

resultDetail.description: Ranking preview, referee summary placeholder, publish state, and publish confirmation. Result belongs to this race only.

resultReview.heroDescription: Admin race-result gate: review referee summary, inspect ranking, then publish only when referee-confirmed. Mock data only.

race-aurora-1200.refereeSummary: Referee confirmed finish order. One warning, one mock penalty note. Ready for admin publish review.
race-aurora-1200.publishState: Publish enabled after referee confirmation. Admin confirmation remains mock-only.

race-delta-1600.refereeSummary: Draft result needs referee confirmation before publish CTA becomes available.
race-delta-1600.publishState: Publish disabled until referee confirms race result.

race-heritage-1400.refereeSummary: Result already published. Public result state is locked for display.
race-heritage-1400.publishState: Published result state. Confirmation CTA replaced by status UI.

publishDialog.description: Publishing makes this race ranking visible as the final official result. This action will automatically trigger the reward splits:
publishDialog.toastSuccess: Race results published successfully! Winnings distributed.
publishDialog.successDescription: Prize splits have been credited to user balances. Ledger transactions and system audit logs successfully updated.

auditViewer.title: System operations logs
auditViewer.description: Immutably tracked security activities, prize disbursements, result publishing, and administrative queue approvals.
auditViewer.searchPlaceholder: Filter audit entries by action, user or details...
auditViewer.empty: No system operations entries found matching the query.

raceForm.title: Create race mock
raceForm.subtitle: UI-only form. No validation service, no API submit.
raceForm.scopeNote: Phase 4C scope: form layout only. Registration approval, result publish, realtime, backend integration stay out.

horses.title: Race Horse List
horses.description: Manage technical profiles and health status for each race horse. Horses must be healthy to qualify for tournament registration.
horses.emptyDescription: You have not registered any race horses yet. Add your first horse to start entering exciting tournaments.

toast.fetchFailed: Unable to fetch horse list from server.
toast.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this horse from your stable?

horsesNew.title: Add New Race Horse
horsesNew.description: Declare technical specifications for your race horse to store in the catalog. This profile is used to review racing eligibility.

toast.error: An error occurred while adding the horse.

horseDetail.description: International standard technical specs and competition history.
horseDetail.editDescription: Edit or update the latest health and technical parameters for this race horse.
horseDetail.notFound: Horse does not exist or you do not have permission to view it.
horseDetail.noDescription: No detailed description about temperament or terrain strengths has been added yet.
horseDetail.noRaceDataDesc: This horse has not participated in any official race or results have not been recorded.

toast.saveError: An error occurred while saving the horse.

races.title: Race List
races.description: Find races currently open for horse registration. Ensure your horse meets health standards before submitting an entry.
races.emptyDescription: There are no races currently open for registration. Please check back later!

toast.fetchFailed: Unable to fetch race list from backend.

raceRegister.title: Register: {{raceName}}
raceRegister.description: Submit your horse's technical profile for tournament admin approval to join the starting lineup.
raceRegister.notAvailable: Race is unavailable or has ended.

toast.loadFailed: Unable to load race or stable information.
toast.registerSuccess: Your race registration has been submitted successfully!
toast.submitError: An error occurred while submitting your entry.

registrations.title: Registration History
registrations.description: Monitor approval progress for your horse's tournament entries from the Organizing Committee. You may cancel or withdraw depending on entry status.

toast.fetchFailed: Unable to load race registration list.

jockeyInvitations.title: Jockey Invitation Management
jockeyInvitations.description: Send invitations to professional jockeys to ride your horses in approved tournament races.
jockeyInvitations.emptyDescription: You have not sent any jockey collaboration invitations yet. Send a new invitation to prepare for upcoming races!

modal.title: Send Jockey Invitation
modal.note: Note: Only horse registrations approved by the Organizing Committee (APPROVED) and not yet assigned a jockey are shown below.
modal.messagePlaceholder: E.g.: I hope you will ride my horse in this upcoming race!

toast.noApprovedRegistrations: No approved registrations without a jockey are available for invitation!
toast.selectRequired: Please select both a race registration and a jockey.
toast.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this jockey invitation?

wallet.title: Earnings Management
wallet.description: Track reward points earned from race results (70/30 split) and submit gift redemption requests at the counter.

toast.fetchFailed: Unable to load wallet information from backend.
toast.cashoutSuccess: Redemption request for {{points}} points submitted! Visit the counter to collect your gift.
toast.cashoutError: An error occurred while creating the withdrawal request.

wallet.title: Jockey Rewards
wallet.description: View points earned through winning jockey assignments (30% split) and process withdrawals.

tournaments.title: Tournament Information
tournaments.description: Search, browse tournament rules, and distances for all active horse racing events.

races.title: Race Schedule
races.description: Track all upcoming horse races or watch live events in progress.

results.title: Live Results & Race Standings
results.description: Look up official finish rankings, run times, and penalty seconds recorded by referees.

rankings.title: Tournament Rankings
rankings.description: Aggregate points, wins, and win rates for top horses and jockeys.

wallet.title: Spectator Points
wallet.description: Track free prediction reward points (+1 correct, -1 wrong) and create redemption codes for physical gifts at the counter.

predictions.title: Race Result Predictions
predictions.description: Predict the winning horse in upcoming races for free and earn real reward points.
predictions.gateNoticeBody: Predictions close when the race goes LIVE. You can only predict races in SCHEDULED, CHECKING, or READY status.
predictions.selectHorseFirst: Please select a horse before submitting your prediction!
predictions.alreadyPredicted: You already placed a prediction for this race!
predictions.winToast: Congratulations! Your prediction was correct — you earned +1 point!
predictions.loseToast: Sorry! Your predicted horse did not finish first. -1 point deducted.

assignments.title: Assignment list
assignments.description: Manage all races the organizers assigned you to officiate.
assignments.emptyDescription: You have not been assigned to officiate any races yet.

preRace.title: Pre-race Check
preRace.description: Select a race under inspection to update horse health and jockey attendance before start.
preRace.emptyDescription: You must be assigned and accept a race before performing pre-race checks.

monitoring.title: Race Monitoring
monitoring.description: Monitor start status, coordinate live races, and manage race state transitions.
monitoring.emptyDescription: You must be assigned and accept a race before monitoring.

resultEntry.title: Confirm Results
resultEntry.description: Select a finished race to enter finish times, run the simulation, or lock the official result sheet.
resultEntry.emptyDescription: You must be assigned and accept a race before entering results.

violations.title: Record Violations
violations.description: Select a race to log jockey rule violations and apply penalty seconds.
violations.emptyDescription: You must be assigned and accept a race before reporting violations.

reports.title: Race Reports
reports.description: Create pre-race or post-race reports to document race events in the system history.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Race summary, officiating decisions, or recommendations...
form.archiveEmpty: No assigned races yet — no archived reports.

raceDetail.description: Inspect safety equipment, horse health, and jockey attendance before start.

redemptions.title: Redemption approval queue
redemptions.description: Process and complete point-to-gift redemption requests when users visit the counter.
redemptions.pendingListDesc: Look up redemption codes provided by Spectator/Owner/Jockey at the counter, verify points balance and proceed with physical gift exchange.
redemptions.historyDesc: Transaction history of redemption codes that were successfully delivered or rejected so far.
redemptions.dialogRejectDesc: Are you sure you want to reject the gift code <1>{{code}}</1> from <2>{{name}}</2> ({{points}} points)?
redemptions.dialogRejectReasonPlaceholder: E.g: Code is expired, account info mismatch...

deposit.title: Customer wallet deposit
deposit.description: Top up wallet balance at the counter. Customer pays cash; staff converts and credits the digital wallet.
deposit.invalidAmount: Deposit amount must be greater than 0.
deposit.safeModeDescription: All counter deposits are strictly audited and stored as audit logs. Confirm you received full cash payment before approving the wallet credit.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.description: Published tournament containers will live here. Phase 2 only confirms the public route shell.
tournaments.emptyDesc: Placeholder route with local mock copy only. Business screens, backend calls, auth guards, and restricted MVP concepts are intentionally not implemented yet.

tournamentDetail.title: Tournament {{id}}
tournamentDetail.description: Container detail placeholder. Later phases list independent races inside this tournament.

races.title: Races
races.description: Race discovery shell with upcoming, live, and published-result placeholders. No live tracking yet.

raceDetail.title: Race {{id}}
raceDetail.description: Public-only race detail placeholder. Future UI shows public schedule, status, participants, and published race result.

errorState.title: Race control interrupted
errorState.description: The current view could not be loaded. This mock-first shell keeps actions local and safe.

profile.loginRequired: Please sign in to view your profile.

profile.description: Manage and view your HorseTrack account details.

marketing.footerSafe: Your data is safe with us

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password

login.title: Sign in to Race Control
login.description: Access your account and manage races like a pro.

register.title: Claim your grid slot
register.description: Create a mock profile request, select the intended role, and preview the HorseTrack MVP.

loginForm.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials.

registerForm.addressPlaceholder: e.g. 1 Main Street, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City
registerForm.acceptPolicy: I understand this is a mock registration with visual-only role assignment.

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Operate tournaments, race schedules, approvals, result publishing, and user role governance.

owner.label: Horse Owner
owner.description: Manage horses, track registrations, invite jockeys, and follow race outcomes per independent race.

jockey.label: Jockey
jockey.description: Review assignments, confirm rides, inspect race schedule, and stay aligned before race start.

referee.label: Referee
referee.description: Monitor assigned races, capture violations, confirm results, and prepare reports for publishing.

spectator.label: Spectator
spectator.description: Browse races, follow live status, make mock predictions, and view published rankings.

counter_staff.label: Counter Staff
counter_staff.description: Manage physical point redemptions, verify exchange codes, view audit logs, and deposit funds to customer wallets.

forbidden.title: Forbidden placeholder
forbidden.description: Real RBAC is intentionally deferred. This route documents the future 403 destination.
